ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sector */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of stocks traded on that date */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* The number of outstanding derivative contracts that have not been settled */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* The closing price adjusted for dividends and splits */,
  "dividend" REAL /* The dividend amount per share */,
  "split" REAL /* The split ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the portfolio */,
  "objective" TEXT /* The investment objective of the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* The risk tolerance of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks owned in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* The average cost of the stocks in the portfolio */,
  "market_value" REAL /* The current market value of the stocks in the portfolio */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* The unrealized gain or loss of the stocks in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the index */,
  "base_year" INTEGER /* Base year of the index for historical comparison */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the market index */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the market index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_performance" (
  "index_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for index performance record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing value of the index */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening value of the index */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest value of the index on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest value of the index on that date */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* The number of outstanding derivative contracts that have not been settled on the index */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* The closing value adjusted for dividends and splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_performance_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* A brief description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being monitored */,
  "trigger_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert should trigger */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
